scope: Deterministic ERP skill registry for controlled pre-LLM capabilities.

catalog.name: create_invoice
catalog.description: Classify invoice creation requests before free-form fallback.

catalog.name: send_invoice
catalog.description: Classify invoice delivery requests before free-form fallback.

catalog.name: register_expense
catalog.description: Classify expense registration requests before free-form fallback.

catalog.name: accounting_post
catalog.description: Classify accounting posting or journal-entry requests before fallback.

catalog.name: inventory_check
catalog.description: Classify stock or inventory-availability checks before fallback.

catalog.name: product_lookup
catalog.description: Classify product lookup requests before fallback.

catalog.name: customer_lookup
catalog.description: Classify customer lookup requests before fallback.

catalog.name: create_task
catalog.description: Create operational follow-up tasks through Alerts Center.

catalog.name: list_pending_tasks
catalog.description: List pending operational tasks through Alerts Center.

catalog.name: create_reminder
catalog.description: Create reminders through Alerts Center.

catalog.name: list_reminders
catalog.description: List reminders through Alerts Center.

catalog.name: create_alert
catalog.description: Create business alerts through Alerts Center.

catalog.name: list_alerts
catalog.description: List operational alerts through Alerts Center.

catalog.name: media_upload
catalog.description: Upload an image or document linked to an operational record.

catalog.name: media_list
catalog.description: List images or documents linked to a record.

catalog.name: media_get
catalog.description: Retrieve a specific file linked to the current tenant.

catalog.name: media_delete
catalog.description: Delete a file linked to a record with explicit confirmation.

catalog.name: entity_search
catalog.description: Search entities safely across modules inside the current tenant.

catalog.name: entity_resolve
catalog.description: Resolve ambiguous references deterministically before acting.

catalog.name: pos_create_draft
catalog.description: Create a POS sale draft before checkout.

catalog.name: pos_get_draft
catalog.description: Load a POS sale draft safely.

catalog.name: pos_add_draft_line
catalog.description: Add a product line into an open POS draft using entity resolution.

catalog.name: pos_add_line_by_reference
catalog.description: Add a POS draft line only after deterministic barcode, SKU or reference resolution.

catalog.name: pos_remove_draft_line
catalog.description: Remove a line from an open POS draft.

catalog.name: pos_attach_customer
catalog.description: Attach a customer to an open POS draft using entity resolution.

catalog.name: pos_list_open_drafts
catalog.description: List open POS drafts for the current tenant.

catalog.name: pos_find_product
catalog.description: Resolve a POS product safely by barcode, SKU, exact name or partial reference.

catalog.name: pos_get_product_candidates
catalog.description: List ranked product candidates for ambiguous POS references.

catalog.name: pos_reprice_draft
catalog.description: Recalculate draft totals and optional line pricing in POS.

catalog.name: pos_finalize_sale
catalog.description: Finalize an open POS draft into a completed sale with line snapshots.

catalog.name: pos_get_sale
catalog.description: Load a POS sale by sale_id.

catalog.name: pos_list_sales
catalog.description: List POS sales with lightweight recency filters.

catalog.name: pos_build_receipt
catalog.description: Prepare a POS ticket or receipt payload without printing hardware.

catalog.name: pos_get_sale_by_number
catalog.description: Load a POS sale by sale_number.

catalog.name: pos_cancel_sale
catalog.description: Cancel a completed POS sale safely while preserving audit trail and future hooks.

catalog.name: pos_create_return
catalog.description: Create a partial or full POS return linked to the original sale.

catalog.name: pos_get_return
catalog.description: Load a POS return by return_id.

catalog.name: pos_list_returns
catalog.description: List POS return records with recency and sale filters.

catalog.name: pos_build_return_receipt
catalog.description: Prepare a POS return receipt payload without printer or fiscal note execution.

catalog.name: pos_open_cash_register
catalog.description: Open a POS cash register session with opening amount control.

catalog.name: pos_get_open_cash_session
catalog.description: Load the current open POS cash register session.

catalog.name: pos_close_cash_register
catalog.description: Close a POS cash register session with counted cash amount.

catalog.name: pos_build_cash_summary
catalog.description: Prepare a POS arqueo or cash summary payload for one session.

catalog.name: pos_list_cash_sessions
catalog.description: List POS cash register sessions with open or closed filters.

catalog.name: purchases_create_draft
catalog.description: Create a purchase draft before registering the supplier purchase.

catalog.name: purchases_get_draft
catalog.description: Load a purchase draft safely.

catalog.name: purchases_add_draft_line
catalog.description: Add a line into an open purchase draft with optional product linking.

catalog.name: purchases_remove_draft_line
catalog.description: Remove a line from an open purchase draft.

catalog.name: purchases_attach_supplier
catalog.description: Attach a supplier to an open purchase draft using entity resolution.

catalog.name: purchases_finalize
catalog.description: Finalize a purchase draft into a registered purchase with line snapshots.

catalog.name: purchases_get_purchase
catalog.description: Load a registered purchase by purchase_id.

catalog.name: purchases_list
catalog.description: List purchases with lightweight filters and recency hints.

catalog.name: purchases_get_by_number
catalog.description: Load a purchase by tenant-scoped purchase_number.

catalog.name: purchases_attach_document_to_draft
catalog.description: Attach a media/document file to an open purchase draft without duplicating storage.
keywords: asociar factura proveedor al draft compra

catalog.name: purchases_attach_document
catalog.description: Attach a supplier invoice or support file to a finalized purchase using media references.

catalog.name: purchases_list_documents
catalog.description: List purchase-linked documents with lightweight purchase or draft filters.

catalog.name: purchases_get_document
catalog.description: Load a linked purchase document by purchase_document_id.

catalog.name: purchases_detach_document
catalog.description: Detach a linked media file from a purchase record while preserving the media asset.

catalog.name: purchases_register_document_metadata
catalog.description: Register or update supplier invoice metadata linked to a purchase document.

catalog.name: fiscal_create_sales_invoice_from_sale
catalog.description: Prepare an internal electronic sales invoice from an existing POS sale.

catalog.name: fiscal_create_credit_note
catalog.description: Prepare an internal credit note from a POS return or canceled sale.

catalog.name: fiscal_create_support_document_from_purchase
catalog.description: Prepare an internal support document from a finalized purchase.

catalog.name: fiscal_build_document_payload
catalog.description: Build a structured internal fiscal payload for future provider mapping.

catalog.name: fiscal_list_documents_by_type
catalog.description: List internal fiscal documents filtered by document_type.
intent_patterns: re:(por tipo|tipo).*(documentos fiscales|facturas electronicas|notas credito|documentos soporte)

catalog.name: fiscal_create_document
catalog.description: Create or prepare an internal fiscal document from a source entity without provider submission.

catalog.name: fiscal_get_document
catalog.description: Load an internal fiscal document by fiscal_document_id.

catalog.name: fiscal_list_documents
catalog.description: List internal fiscal documents with lightweight source, type or status filters.

catalog.name: fiscal_get_by_source
catalog.description: Resolve one internal fiscal document from its source module and source entity reference.

catalog.name: fiscal_record_event
catalog.description: Record a lifecycle event for an internal fiscal document.

catalog.name: fiscal_update_status
catalog.description: Update the lifecycle status of an internal fiscal document safely.

catalog.name: ecommerce_create_store
catalog.description: Create a canonical ecommerce store or sales channel record.

catalog.name: ecommerce_update_store
catalog.description: Update metadata or status of an existing ecommerce store.

catalog.name: ecommerce_register_credentials
catalog.description: Register masked ecommerce credentials without exposing raw secrets.

catalog.name: ecommerce_validate_store_setup
catalog.description: Validate the lightweight setup state of an ecommerce store.

catalog.name: ecommerce_validate_connection
catalog.description: Validate the masked credential shape and adapter selection for an ecommerce store.

catalog.name: ecommerce_get_store_metadata
catalog.description: Load normalized metadata and adapter context for one ecommerce store.
intent_patterns: re:(ver|mostrar|muestra|consulta|cargar).*(metadata ecommerce|metadata de tienda ecommerce|metadata del canal ecommerce)

catalog.name: ecommerce_get_platform_capabilities
catalog.description: Expose normalized adapter capabilities for a store or explicit ecommerce platform.
intent_patterns: re:(que puede hacer|qué puede hacer|que soporta|qué soporta).*(integracion|integración|tienda|woocommerce|tiendanube|prestashop)

catalog.name: ecommerce_ping_store
catalog.description: Run the safe ping preflight for an ecommerce store adapter.

catalog.name: ecommerce_list_stores
catalog.description: List ecommerce stores with lightweight platform and status filters.

catalog.name: ecommerce_get_store
catalog.description: Load a single ecommerce store by store_id.

catalog.name: ecommerce_create_sync_job
catalog.description: Create a sync job tracking record for an ecommerce store.

catalog.name: ecommerce_list_sync_jobs
catalog.description: List ecommerce sync jobs by store, sync_type or status.

catalog.name: ecommerce_list_order_refs
catalog.description: List canonical ecommerce order references for a store.

catalog.name: ecommerce_link_order
catalog.description: Link one ecommerce order to an optional local reference for a store.

catalog.name: ecommerce_get_order_link
catalog.description: Load one ecommerce order link by link_id.
intent_patterns: re:(ver|mostrar|muestra|consulta|abre|abrir).*(vinculo pedido ecommerce|link pedido ecommerce|orden vinculada ecommerce)
re:(vinculo pedido ecommerce|link pedido ecommerce|orden vinculada ecommerce).*(ver|mostrar|muestra|consulta|abre|abrir)

catalog.name: ecommerce_list_order_links
catalog.description: List ecommerce order links for one store with lightweight filters.
intent_patterns: re:(lista|listar|muestra|mostrar|ver|consulta).*(vinculos de pedidos ecommerce|links de pedidos ecommerce|ordenes vinculadas ecommerce)
re:(vinculos de pedidos ecommerce|links de pedidos ecommerce|ordenes vinculadas ecommerce).*(lista|listar|muestra|mostrar|ver|consulta)

catalog.name: ecommerce_register_order_pull_snapshot
catalog.description: Register a normalized inbound ecommerce order snapshot without creating local sales automatically.
intent_patterns: re:(registra|registrar|guarda|guardar).*(snapshot pull pedido ecommerce|pull pedido ecommerce|snapshot orden ecommerce)
re:(snapshot pull pedido ecommerce|pull pedido ecommerce|snapshot orden ecommerce).*(registra|registrar|guarda|guardar)

catalog.name: ecommerce_normalize_external_order
catalog.description: Normalize one external ecommerce order payload for safe downstream sync preparation.

catalog.name: ecommerce_mark_order_sync_status
catalog.description: Record the sync status of one ecommerce order link safely.
intent_patterns: re:(marca|marcar|actualiza|actualizar|cambia|cambiar).*(estado sync pedido ecommerce|sync orden ecommerce|estado de pedido ecommerce)
re:(estado sync pedido ecommerce|sync orden ecommerce|estado de pedido ecommerce).*(marca|marcar|actualiza|actualizar|cambia|cambiar)

catalog.name: ecommerce_get_order_snapshot
catalog.description: Load the latest ecommerce order snapshot for one store and external order id.

catalog.name: ecommerce_link_product
catalog.description: Link one local product to one ecommerce product reference for a store.
keywords: vincula este producto con la tienda

catalog.name: ecommerce_unlink_product
catalog.description: Remove one ecommerce product link safely by link_id.

catalog.name: ecommerce_list_product_links
catalog.description: List ecommerce product links for one store with lightweight filters.

catalog.name: ecommerce_get_product_link
catalog.description: Load one ecommerce product link by link_id.

catalog.name: ecommerce_prepare_product_push_payload
catalog.description: Prepare the normalized outbound ecommerce product payload for one local product.
intent_patterns: re:(prepara|preparar|arma|armar|construye|construir).*(payload push ecommerce|push ecommerce producto|payload producto ecommerce)
re:(payload push ecommerce|push ecommerce producto|payload producto ecommerce).*(prepara|preparar|arma|armar|construye|construir)

catalog.name: ecommerce_register_product_pull_snapshot
catalog.description: Register a normalized inbound ecommerce product snapshot without creating local products automatically.
intent_patterns: re:(registra|registrar|guarda|guardar).*(snapshot pull ecommerce|pull ecommerce producto|snapshot producto ecommerce)
re:(snapshot pull ecommerce|pull ecommerce producto|snapshot producto ecommerce).*(registra|registrar|guarda|guardar)

catalog.name: ecommerce_mark_product_sync_status
catalog.description: Record the sync status of one ecommerce product link safely.
intent_patterns: re:(marca|marcar|actualiza|actualizar|cambia|cambiar).*(estado sync ecommerce|sync producto ecommerce|estado de producto ecommerce)
re:(estado sync ecommerce|sync producto ecommerce|estado de producto ecommerce).*(marca|marcar|actualiza|actualizar|cambia|cambiar)

catalog.name: tenant_add_user
catalog.description: Attach an existing user to the current tenant with a controlled role.

catalog.name: tenant_list_users
catalog.description: List users attached to the current tenant without leaking other tenants.

catalog.name: tenant_get_user_role
catalog.description: Return the role and effective permissions for one tenant user safely.

catalog.name: tenant_update_user_role
catalog.description: Change the role of one tenant user under explicit authorization.

catalog.name: tenant_deactivate_user
catalog.description: Deactivate one tenant user without deleting cross-tenant identity data.

catalog.name: tenant_check_permission
catalog.description: Check whether a tenant user can execute a module/action pair safely.

catalog.name: tenant_assign_plan
catalog.description: Assign one SaaS plan to the current tenant with pricing metadata hooks.

catalog.name: tenant_get_plan
catalog.description: Return the current SaaS plan assigned to the active tenant.

catalog.name: tenant_list_plans
catalog.description: List the SaaS plans available for assignment.

catalog.name: tenant_set_plan_limits
catalog.description: Update one plan limit definition without enforcing runtime blocking yet.

catalog.name: tenant_check_plan_limit
catalog.description: Check one plan limit with optional usage value for the active tenant.

catalog.name: tenant_get_enabled_modules
catalog.description: Resolve enabled modules from the current tenant plan safely.

catalog.name: usage_record_event
catalog.description: Record one usage event for the current tenant without enabling hard blocking.

catalog.name: usage_get_summary
catalog.description: Return the tenant usage summary with near-limit and over-limit signals.

catalog.name: usage_check_limit
catalog.description: Compare one usage metric against the current tenant plan limit safely.

catalog.name: usage_list_metrics
catalog.description: List the supported usage metrics exposed by the runtime.

catalog.name: usage_get_history
catalog.description: Return the usage event history for one tenant metric.

catalog.name: agent_list_tool_groups
catalog.description: List the agent tool groups available for the active tenant and user.

catalog.name: agent_get_module_capabilities
catalog.description: Return capability details for one module without inventing disabled or denied actions.

catalog.name: agent_resolve_tool_for_request
catalog.description: Resolve the safest module/tool group for one business request and return clarification when needed.
intent_patterns: re:(que modulo uso|que herramienta uso|resuelve herramienta|resuelve modulo|a que modulo va|que tool uso)
re:(modulo correcto|herramienta correcta|ruta correcta).*(para|segun la solicitud|segun el caso)

catalog.name: agent_check_module_enabled
catalog.description: Check whether one module is enabled for the current tenant plan.

catalog.name: agent_check_action_allowed
catalog.description: Check whether the current user is allowed to execute one module action.

catalog.name: agentops_get_metrics_summary
catalog.description: Return the AgentOps summary for module usage, fallback rate, latency and errors.

catalog.name: agentops_list_recent_decisions
catalog.description: List recent agent decision traces for one tenant without leaking other tenants.

catalog.name: agentops_list_tool_executions
catalog.description: List recent tool execution traces including schema, permission and plan checks.

catalog.name: agentops_get_anomaly_flags
catalog.description: Return current anomaly flags for AgentOps fallback, latency and repeated failures.

catalog.name: read_document
catalog.description: Handle document-reading requests before free-form fallback.

catalog.name: extract_invoice_data
catalog.description: Handle invoice data extraction requests before free-form fallback.

catalog.name: generate_report
catalog.description: Handle report-generation requests with deterministic clarification before fallback.

catalog.name: business_explain
catalog.description: Support ERP process explanations with retrieval-first context before fallback.

catalog.name: dataset_lookup
catalog.description: Route explicit dataset or knowledge-base lookups to semantic retrieval before LLM fallback.

catalog.name: image_analysis
catalog.description: Handle image or screenshot analysis requests before free-form fallback.
